creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 237280
core.txt file from crash

N.B. This may be hardware related!

Network lost association. Did netif restart and re-associated, bit could not access net. Could not open network login page. After reboot, the system paniced consistently.

Power cycle made no difference. Always paniced after:
starting wpa_supplicnt.
wlan0: ieee80211_new_stte_locked: pending SCAN -> AUTH transition lost
Invalid TXQ idiwlwifi0: fc 0x00b0 sta_id 0 tid 0 txq_id 65535 mvm 0xfffffe00f87fa388 skb 0xfffff800002773800 { len 30 } info 0xfffffe00d5ea8cf0 sta 0xfffff80000af92880

panic: lkpi_sta_auth_to_scan: lsta 0xfffff80347cb6800 state not NONE: 0, nstate 1 arg 1

Remainder of output is in attached core.txt

System info: Lenovo T16
CPU: 12th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-1235U (Alder Lake)
24GB RAM

FreeBSD ptavv 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #2 main-n257717-281a6ff273d-dirty: Thu Sep 22 12:38:30 PDT 2022     root@newptavv:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC amd64
